sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n89641" key="proskophte/on" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">προσκοπητέον</orth>, <sense id="n89641.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">one must consider beforehand</tr_>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Nech.</author> </bibl> ap. <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1764.tlg001:291:19" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Vett.Val.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">291.19</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
